ideation: This sequence portrays a gentle, reverent offering, befitting the diya lamp emoji.  The arms move in a slow, deliberate arc, bringing the palms together as if presenting the lamp.  The movement is designed to be graceful and peaceful. The first frame shows arms at the sides, neutral and relaxed. The second frame has the arms moving up and slightly forward, palms facing each other. The third frame shows the palms close together as if cradling an imaginary lamp. The fourth frame shows the arms gently lowering, still holding the space where the lamp would be. The fifth frame shows the arms returning to their resting position.

frames.beat: arms rest at the sides, still and waiting
arms lift slowly, palms begin to turn inward
palms meet, cradling a gentle light
arms lower reverently, holding the offering
arms return to rest, the offering complete
